extract: Basculegion (Japanese: イダイトウ Idaitou) is a dual-type Water/Ghost Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It evolves from White-Striped Basculin when leveled up after losing at least 294 HP from recoil damage without fainting. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
